description_short: IT technical services, hosting specialists, cyber security, licensing & management, software development, cloud-based telephony and broadband solutions.
description_long: Aware Soft provides a range of IT services including backup & disaster recovery, virtualisation, SQL server troubleshooting, ISO certification, and more. We also offer hosting solutions, cyber security services, comprehensive licensing and management, bespoke software development, and cloud-based telephony and broadband solutions.
